title: Courtroom and offices
doc_html:
§2488.56.  Courtroom and offices

The expenses of operation and maintenance of the courtroom and offices shall be apportioned equally between the town of Marksville and the parish of Avoyelles.  

Added by Acts 1971, No. 16, §1.
